title: The base should be provided to parseInt
description: The base should be provided to "parseInt"Analyze your codeintentionality-completereliabilityBugQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEuser-experienceWhy is this an issue?TheparseIntfunction has two versions, one that takes a base value as a second argument, and one that does not. Unfortunately using the single-arg version can result in unexpected results on older browsers.Noncompliant code exampleparseInt("010"); // Noncompliant; pre-2013 browsers may return 8Compliant solutionparseInt("010", 10);Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. A
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

compliant: parseInt("010");  // Noncompliant; pre-2013 browsers may return 8

checks.message: parseInt should be called with a base parameter (second argument)
